judgment.summary: Profitable alternative asset manager with strong forward multiples and growth estimates, but facing revenue headwinds and high leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 2.9%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Forward P/E 12.44x — attractive relative to trailing P/E of 82.65x.
PEG ratio 0.70 — suggests earnings growth may outpace valuation.
Analyst growth estimates are positive for the current quarter (14.5%) and fiscal year (5.9%).
Strong cash position ($41.95B) relative to debt ($40.03B) provides liquidity.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 17 analysts with a mean target of $149.59.
negatives: Revenue growth YoY is negative at -9.2%, indicating top-line challenges.
Profit margin is low at 3.7%, despite a higher operating margin.
Debt/Equity ratio is high at 101.27%, indicating significant leverage.
Dividend payout ratio is unsustainable at 128.3%, suggesting potential future cuts.
Beta of 1.52 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Apollo Global Management (APO) has no recent headlines to provide immediate trading context. The upcoming earnings report on August 4th will be a key catalyst for price discovery. Traders should consider the current analyst consensus of 'buy' and the mean target price of $149.59 as potential directional indicators.
